name: Derivada de Polinomio Cuadrático
description: Calcula la derivada de ax² + bx + c evaluada en un punto x.
seo_description: Calcula la derivada de ax² + bx + c evaluada en un punto x. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Introduce tus valores y obtiene resultados.
example_label: Calculate results using the provided input values.

range_hints.c: Enter value within min-max range shown.

range_hints.b: Enter value within min-max range shown.

result_context: The calculated result provides the main output value.
steps: Calculate and display the derivative result
mistakes: Not verifying input values are within realistic ranges for your scenario
Entering zero or negative values where positive numbers are required
Rounding intermediate results too early in multi-step calculations
